name: Juice Alpokat (Indonesian Avocado Drink)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and water. Heat over medium-high heat, stirring until clear.
2. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Scoop out avocado pulp and place in blender.
4. Add syrup to the blender and blend until smooth.
5. Add cold milk to the blender and blend again.
6. Divide mixture between 2 tall glasses.
7. Top each serving with 1/2 cup chocolate milk (forming a separate layer) and crushed ice.
